response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements — while his recent work is focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in non-financial domains.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated contribution to open-source projects and technical workshops
Proven ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD and testing practices
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows or in capital markets systems
Missing domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or related financial products
SQL experience listed generically without mention of SQL Server or Oracle

key_factors.factor: Generic SQL skills without required databases
